<!-- indicator: fig-dv-victim-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-dv-victim-rate
#| fig-cap: 'Domestic Violence Victims Reported, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Domestic Violence Victims Reported, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-dv-victim-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
